neoapi_common.hpp
1 /* \file neoapi_common.hpp
2  \brief This file is part of the NeoAPI - It provides the C++ API Interface.
3  Copyright (c) by Baumer Optronic GmbH. All rights reserved, please see the provided licence document for full details.
4  */
5 #ifndef _NEOAPI_COMMON_HPP__
6 #define _NEOAPI_COMMON_HPP__
7 
8 #include <string.h>
9 #include <cstddef>
10 #include <cstdint>
11 
12 #define NEOAPI_CPP_TYPE
13 #if defined(_WIN32)
14 #ifdef neoapi_cpp_EXPORTS
15 #define NEOAPI_CPP_DECL __declspec(dllexport)
16 #else
17 #define NEOAPI_CPP_DECL __declspec(dllimport)
18 #endif
19 #elif defined(__GNUC__) && (__GNUC__ >= 4) && (defined(__linux__) || defined(__APPLE__))
20 #define NEOAPI_CPP_DECL __attribute__((visibility("default")))
21 #undef NEOAPI_CPP_TYPE
22 #define NEOAPI_CPP_TYPE __attribute__((visibility("default")))
23 #else
24 #define NEOAPI_CPP_DECL
25 #endif
26 
27 class StringData;
28 class NeoStringListData;
29 class NeoStringListIteratorData;
30 class CamExceptionData;
31 
32 namespace NeoAPI {

44 class NEOAPI_CPP_DECL NeoString {
45  public:
49  NeoString();
50 
55  NeoString(const NeoString& object);
56 
61  NeoString(const char* text);
62 
66  virtual ~NeoString();
67 
73  const NeoString& operator= (const char * text);
74 
80  const NeoString& operator= (const NeoString& object);
81 
87  bool operator== (const NeoString& object);
88 
94  bool operator== (const NeoString& object) const;
95 
101  bool operator== (const char* text);
102 
108  bool operator== (const char* text) const;
109 
115  bool operator!= (const NeoString& object);
116 
122  bool operator!= (const NeoString& object) const;
123 
129  bool operator!= (const char* text);
130 
136  bool operator!= (const char* text) const;
137 
142  const char* c_str() const;
143 
148  operator const char *() const;
149 
154  size_t length() const;
155 
156  protected:
161  StringData* data_;
162 };
